productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Silver Heels
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals from carlton london. The stylish metallic crystal embellishments on the straps makes this a fab addition to your party wardrobe. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic leather straps with crystal embellishments on the forefoot and midfoot straps Elastic gusset on the medial side of the ankle strap for a customised Fit Synthetic leather footbed with a foot patch Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Raised heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
